expectations.text: Chooses `.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/handoff.md` instead of the root scratchpad path.
Invokes or explicitly follows addy-context-engineering before deciding what context to save.
expectations.evidence: Handoff is compact, continuation-oriented, and limits Relevant Files to a small durable set, which matches the context-selection behavior the dependency skill requires.

expectations.text: Writes the handoff using the required sections: Goal, Current Status, Decisions and Constraints, Relevant Files, Open Questions or Blockers, Recommended Next Step.
expectations.evidence: All required section headings appear in the expected order.

expectations.text: Relevant Files entries include a short reason each path matters.
expectations.evidence: Each Relevant Files bullet includes a path plus a short why-it-matters reason.

expectations.text: The summary stays concise and does not turn into a transcript or raw log dump.
expectations.evidence: Handoff is 178 words and does not include transcript/log markers.

expectations.text: Chooses the default path `.agents/scratchpad/handoff.md` when no feature-scoped scratchpad spec or plan is in context.
Invokes or explicitly follows addy-context-engineering before choosing what to preserve.
expectations.evidence: Handoff is compact, continuation-oriented, and limits Relevant Files to a small durable set, which matches the context-selection behavior the dependency skill requires.

expectations.text: Captures the blocker or open question clearly enough for the next agent to resume.
expectations.evidence: Open Questions or Blockers names the missing environment-variable problem clearly enough to resume.

expectations.text: Includes a concrete recommended next step instead of ending with a generic summary.
expectations.evidence: Recommended Next Step is specific and action-oriented.

expectations.text: Recognizes that a scratchpad spec file is enough to select the feature-scoped output path.
expectations.evidence: The skill wrote beside the spec at `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/handoff.md`.

expectations.text: Writes the handoff beside the spec as `.agents/scratchpad/feature-export/handoff.md`.
Keeps the handoff continuation-oriented, with the next step anchored to the active feature context.
expectations.evidence: Recommended Next Step is concrete and references the active export feature/spec context.
